repo.description: Unsupervised Speech Decomposition Via Triple Information Bottleneck

terms.context_snippet: This repository provides a PyTorch implementation of [SpeechSplit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2004.11284), which enables more detailed speaking style conversion by disentangling speech into content, timbre, rhythm and pitch.
